articles.title: What QTS’ Canceled $30B Project Reveals About AI Data Center Development
articles.description: QTS withdrew its $30 billion Digital Gateway project despite strong infrastructure, raising questions about whether permitting certainty and community opposition now rival power availability as deal-breaking factors.

articles.title: Do Data Centers Cause Air Pollution? It Depends on Power.
articles.description: A data center’s air-quality impact varies widely depending on the facility's power source, grid mix, and whether it uses on-site generation.
